calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-09-2018 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-05-2017 Continued To Jan-09-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Stan Frazier for Renald Bacigalupi (Petitioner/Administrator).

The Court stated that it is still waiting for a supplement describing the property. Mr. Frazier requested one more continuance stating that he has a supplement, that they are having a problem with title on the property, that they believe the estate owns 1/6, that when looking at the deed it refers to 1/4, that they have to get it reformed and that if he can't get the other owners to sign it, he will take the matter off calendar and file an 850 Petition. The Petition for Final Distribution is continued to January 9, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Closing Estate
Off Calendar Apr-04-2017 Continued To May-02-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator and the Attorney to appear on May 2, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why a Petition to close the Estate or a petition for approval of report of status of administration has not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.
